command:
pwd && ls -la && printf '
--- top-level files ---
' && find . -maxdepth 2 \( -type f -o -type l \) | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -400 && printf '
--- git status ---
' && git status --short && printf '
--- ps grep sync/settlement ---
' && ps -ef | grep -Ei 'sync-agent|settlement|recon|queue|worker' | grep -v grep || true && printf '
--- openclaw status ---
' && openclaw status || true

set -e
printf '\n--- filenames matching finance/sync/settlement/recon/queue ---\n'
find /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-ae003 -maxdepth 5 -type f | grep -Ei '(finance|settlement|sync|recon|queue|backlog|handoff|runbook|incident|ops)' | sort | head -500 || true
printf '\n--- grep likely runbook text ---\n'
grep -RIniE 'sync-agent|settlement sync|backlog|reconciliation|restart recovery|queue starts draining|finance close|exec bridge' /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-ae003 2>/dev/null | head -300 || true
printf '\n--- docker/services/systemd hints ---\n'
( docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Image}}\t{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null || true )
( systemctl list-units --type=service --all 2>/dev/null | grep -Ei 'sync|settlement|queue|worker|recon' || true )

printf '
--- settlement-sync.log ---
' && sed -n '1,240p' logs/settlement-sync.log && printf '
--- cwd hidden files ---
' && find . -maxdepth 3 \( -type f -o -type l \) | sed 's#^./##' | sort | grep -Ei 'env|config|yaml|yml|json|service|compose|docker|supervisor|procfile|pm2|log' | head -400 && printf '
--- search for sync-agent command references ---
' && grep -RIniE ' sync-agent |settlement-sync|reconciliation timeout|restart' . 2>/dev/null | head -300
